interpretation: S00 counts and S05c raw covariance anchor were rebuilt before projection
folds hold out whole runs; no train rows from the held-out run enter priors or ML reliability training
ML reliability inputs are own-stave waveform summaries only; no run, event, time, residual, or target-stave labels
B2 two-ended prior variance is larger than the downstream mean, so B2 receives less projection weight
guards against a target echo or accidental direct residual feature
large residual-width gains are not accepted if they shift the downstream median strongly
